home.title: Hilads — see what's happening in your city & meet locals and travelers
home.description: See who's around and what's happening in your city today, and meet locals and travelers — live city chat, events and hangouts nearby. Real-time, no sign-up.
home.intro: Hilads is a live social layer on top of cities. Open it and instantly see who's around and what's happening today, meet locals and travelers, and jump into events and hangouts near you — no profiles, no sign-up.
home.aboutBody: Pick your city and you're in its live chat in seconds. See who's online nearby, meet locals and travelers, discover events and hangouts happening today, and start something of your own. Hilads makes every city feel alive, right now.

common.aboutHiladsBody: Hilads is a live social layer over cities worldwide. Open the app, see who's around right now, join an event in one tap, or host your own. No friends list to build first.

event.title: {title} — meet locals and travelers | Hilads
event.titleCity: {title} in {city} — meet locals and travelers | Hilads
event.descPast: {title} in {city}{when}.{attended} See what's happening now and meet locals and travelers on Hilads.
event.descUpcoming: Join {title} in {city}{time} — meet locals and travelers and see what's happening nearby. No sign-up on Hilads.

venue.title: {name} — meet locals and travelers | Hilads
venue.titleCity: {name} in {city} — meet locals and travelers | Hilads
venue.desc: {name}{where} — meet locals and travelers and see what's happening nearby on Hilads. Real-time, no sign-up.
venue.aboutBar: {name} is a bar in {city}. Hilads shows you who's heading there today and other places nearby with the same energy.
venue.aboutCafe: {name} is a coffee shop in {city}. Hilads is the easy way to find people to grab a coffee with — locals and travelers, no awkward profile-swiping.

category.title: {label} in {city}
category.descMany: {total} {label} in {city} right now. See who's going and join in one tap — real-time, no sign-up.
category.descSomeUpcoming: {city} {label} on Hilads. {count} upcoming — meet locals and travelers in one tap.
category.descSomeBrowse: {city} {label} on Hilads. Browse venues — meet locals and travelers in one tap.
category.descFew: Looking for {label} in {city}? Hilads lists what's actually on tonight. Small but real.
category.aboutBody: Hilads is the easy way to find people for {label} in {city}. Open the app, see who's heading out, join in one tap.

city.title: What is happening locally in {city} {timeframe} — events, meetups and locals to meet | Hilads
city.descHigh: {count}+ events in {city} this week — meetups, dinners, rooftop hangouts. Live chat with locals online right now. No sign-up.
city.descMid: Tonight in {city}: meetups, dinners and hangouts with locals and travelers. Live chat + see who's online right now. No sign-up.
city.descLow: See who's in {city} right now and what's happening tonight — live city chat, meetups, hangouts. Real-time, no sign-up.
city.introEmpty: — be the first to bring the city out.
city.noEvents: No events yet — open the app to create the first one.
city.regionGeneric: Live in {country} or just visiting? Hilads brings the people out.
city.aboutBody1: Hilads is a live social layer over {city}. Open the app, see who's around right now, jump into something happening, or host your own event. No friends list to build first, no sign-up to get in.
city.aboutBody2: Whether you live in {city} or you're visiting for a few days, Hilads makes it easy to meet people the way locals do — through what's actually happening, not through profiles.

past.title: Past hangouts & pulses in {city} | Hilads
past.descItems: A look back at recent hangouts and pulses in {city} on Hilads — see what locals and travelers got up to, then find what's on next.
past.introItems: A look back at recent hangouts and pulses in {city}.
past.whatsNextBody: This is what recently happened in {city} on Hilads. See {link} and join in one tap.
